2604.18360.title: Omni-Embed-Audio: Leveraging Multimodal LLMs for Robust Audio-Text Retrieval
2604.18360.paper_summary: Audio-text retrieval systems based on Contrastive Language-Audio Pretraining (CLAP) achieve strong performance on traditional benchmarks; however, these benchmarks rely on caption-style queries that differ substantially from real-world search behavior, limiting their assessment of practical retrieval robustness. We present Omni-Embed-Audio (OEA), a retrieval-oriented encoder leveraging multimodal LLMs with native audio understanding. To systematically evaluate robustness beyond caption-style queries, we introduce User-Intent Queries (UIQs) - five formulations reflecting natural search behaviors: questions, commands, keyword tags, paraphrases, and exclusion-based negative queries. For negative queries, we develop a hard negative mining pipeline and propose discrimination metrics (HNSR, TFR) assessing models' ability to suppress acoustically similar distractors. Experiments on AudioCaps, Clotho, and MECAT show that OEA achieves comparable text-to-audio retrieval performance to state-of-the-art M2D-CLAP, while demonstrating clear advantages in two critical areas: (1) dominant text-to-text retrieval (+22% relative improvement), and (2) substantially superior hard negative discrimination (+4.3%p HNSR@10, +34.7% relative TFR@10), revealing that LLM backbones provide superior semantic understanding of complex queries.
2604.18360.paper_summary_zh: 音頻文本檢索系統基於對比語言-音頻預訓練（CLAP）在傳統基準上表現出色；然而，這些基準依賴於與現實世界搜索行為有顯著不同的標題式查詢，限制了它們對實際檢索穩健性的評估。<lb/>我們提出了Omni-Embed-Audio（OEA），這是一種檢索導向的編碼器，利用具有原生音頻理解的多模態LLM。<lb/>為了系統性地評估超越標題式查詢的穩健性，我們引入了用戶意圖查詢（UIQs）——五種反映自然搜索行為的表述：問題、命令、關鍵字標籤、同義改寫和基於排除的負查詢。<lb/>對於負查詢，我們開發了一個困難負樣本挖掘管道，並提出了評估指標（HNSR，TFR），以評估模型抑制聲學上相似的干擾項的能力。<lb/>在AudioCaps、Clotho和MECAT上的實驗顯示，OEA在文本到音頻檢索性能上達到了與最先進的M2D-CLAP相當的水平，同時在兩個關鍵領域顯示出明顯優勢：（1）主導的文本到文本檢索（+22%相對提升），以及（2）顯著優越的困難負樣本區分（+4.3%p HNSR@10，+34.7%相對TFR@10），揭示了LLM骨幹提供了對複雜查詢的優越語義理解。
2604.18360.author: HaeJun Yoo et.al.
2604.18360.authors: HaeJun Yoo, Yongseop Shin, Insung Lee, Myoung-Wan Koo, Du-Seong Chang
